**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Gemandi Photo-Electric Technology Co. is formally registered as an electronic device manufacturer, but forensic data analysis strongly redefines it as an asset-light lighting equipment distributor and landscape engineering contractor. Despite possessing a fully paid-in capital of 5 million RMB, the enterprise reports a micro-scale workforce of only 2 insured employees for the 2024 fiscal year. A 2-person team fundamentally cannot operate physical production lines for transformers, ballasts, or lighting fixtures. Consequently, the entity acts as a commercial front: focusing on sales, import/export trade, and securing municipal/commercial 'landscape lighting engineering' (景观亮化工程) contracts. All physical hardware manufacturing is highly likely outsourced to OEM partners. Its registered address—located on the ground floor of a commercial building—further substantiates a storefront or trading office model rather than an industrial manufacturing plant.
